name: Concord Acquisition Corp II
business: Concord Acquisition Corp II is a blank check company incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger or business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operating history or revenues. On August 26, 2024, it entered into a merger agreement with Events.com.

exposures.sentence: utilize our deep understanding of emerging trends within the financial services and financial technology sectors to identify the most attractive segments and to assess suitable merger candidates;

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have until December 31, 2026, or during any extended time that the Company has to consummate an initial business combination as a result of a stockholder vote to amend the Company's amended and restated certificate of incorporation (Second Extension Period), to consummate an initial business combination.
